## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content publishing priorities and unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is the top priority:** A 40% WoW drop in engaged sessions underscores the need to clear the 17-article review backlog to regain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**New content formats approved:** The team will create articles from video transcripts (keynotes, webinars) and explore two new types of comparison pieces: direct competitor analyses and "Ambient + Partner" integration guides.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Review process is unchanged:** Ambient will continue to review all articles pre-publication, rejecting the "publish-then-review" proposal to maintain quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Engaged sessions dropped 40% WoW after four weeks of growth, highlighting the need for consistent publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**Blocker:** A backlog of 17 articles awaits review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution (Rejected):** Publish articles first, then review.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Rejected by Alberto to maintain quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [**Action:** Mau will review articles today to unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish 5 articles by EOW to regain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**New Assignments:** 5 new article ideas are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Video-to-Article Conversion**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Repurpose video content (keynotes, webinars) into articles.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will create transcripts from provided video links.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
          - [Public YouTube keynote → GrowthX will pull the transcript.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
          - [Vimeo-hosted webinars → Everest to provide links; can be transcribed via API.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**New Comparison Pieces**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Success:** The Zero Eyes comparison article was a major internal hit.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Two New Formats Approved:**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
        1.  [**Direct Competitor Analysis:** Compare Ambient vs. a competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
        2.  [**Integration Guides:** Show how to deploy "Ambient on top of X-brand" (e.g., Milestones VMS, Penel Pax).](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** GrowthX can use SEO data (SEMrush) to identify high-potential topics, but the long-term goal is to cover all relevant competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mau:** Review articles in Airtable today to unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Everest:**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Provide Vimeo links for webinar transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Create a doc with new content ideas (guides, abstracts).](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Pull the YouTube keynote transcript.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research on competitor lists from Everest.](https://fathom.video/share/2kTAcA7N_w1inrziFKjzCD2DWyPfsqgh?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
